Functions and structures for 8-bit framebuffer management and tiled bitmap compositing.


## Files
- **[bitblt_private.c](bitblt_private.c.md)**: Implements functions for tiled bitmap compositing with various color formats and blending modes.
- **[framebuffer.c](framebuffer.c.md)**: Functions for managing an 8-bit framebuffer, including clearing and marking dirty regions.
- **[framebuffer.h](framebuffer.h.md)**: Defines the FrameBuffer structure and functions for managing an 8-bit framebuffer in Pebble firmware.
